summary: Legislative provisions of Motor Transport Workers Act, 1961
text: The Delegated Legislative Provisions (Amendment) Act, 1985 (4 of 1986) 2 THE MOTOR TRANSPORT WORKERS ACT, 1961 (27 of 1961)1 [20th May, 1961] An Act to provide for the welfare of motor transport workers and to regulate the conditions of their work Be it enacted by Parliament in the Twelfth Year of the Republic of India as follows:- Chapter I PRELIMINARY 1
